item.title: Recv
item.description: The recv system call Background Learning how to use the sockets API was one of the most rewarding programming experiences I had, but there are a myriad of caveats that can snag up even seasoned developers. Let’s take a look at one of these potential pitfalls and attempt to address it. The recv system call For the sake of simplicity, we’ll only consider the case of a non-blocking socket on a single-threaded server.
